picks.quote: 7,900 Luana Santos seems like a great value play... she's just going to do more a result, she should win the rounds and if she wins the rounds, wins the fight.

I expect Horiguchi to carry the bulk of the ownership in the main event. So, you'd actually be getting different by playing the other side of Manel Kape, but if you want to go with Kyoji Horiguchi because you're starved for dogs, by all means.

Kevin Borjas is Peruvian, right? They They have bricks for chins... I don't mind if he goes out there and scores you 20 points. I'm fine with that. Because it's your cash games, right? You're looking for that scoring floor. You're not trying to capture all the upside.
